description: Configuration for the Skills repository and PARA method locations.

usage.note: All skill paths use SKILLS_ROOT, PARA method locations use PARA_ROOT
usage.actual_example: If SKILLS_ROOT is 'C:\Skills' and PARA_ROOT is 'C:\GoogleDrive', then paths become 'C:\Skills\automation\skill_daily_planning.md' and 'C:\GoogleDrive\03_Areas\Keys\Environments\environments.json'
